name: Acquired (drug-induced) resistance model — NSCLC first line
description: Mechanistic resistance whose ORIGIN is acquired, not pre-existing: a drug-sensitive clone S and a resistant clone R observed together as tumor size V = S + R, but the resistant clone is GENERATED during treatment — under drug pressure E, sensitive cells convert to resistant at switching rate alpha (dS/dt = (kg - kd*E)*S - alpha*E*S; dR/dt = kgr*R + alpha*E*S), starting from R0 = 0 (no resistance pre-exists). The kg/kd/kgr are matched to the pre-existing two-population model so the contrast isolates the resistance ORIGIN — acquired switching vs a pre-existing resistant subclone — a model-selection axis one layer below the phenomenological-vs-mechanistic choice. Parameter values are illustrative (NSCLC first-line scale) and unverified; the switching rate alpha is biologically interpretable (Goldie-Coldman acquired-mutation kinetics) but, like the pre-existing R0, poorly identified from a short trial.

extraction.source_locator: model form (Foo-Michor 2014 acquired-resistance evolution); value illustrative (matched to two-population kg)
extraction.tier_rationale: Established two-clone model form; growth rate is indication-specific.

parameters.label: drug-induced kill potency on the sensitive clone

extraction.source_locator: model form; value illustrative (matched to two-population kd)
extraction.tier_rationale: Kill potency poorly identified from short trials; high IIV CV.

extraction.source_locator: model form; value illustrative (matched to two-population kgr)
extraction.tier_rationale: Resistant-clone kinetics rarely measured directly; single-context value.

parameters.label: acquired-resistance switching rate (sensitive → resistant per effect-unit)

extraction.tier_rationale: The drug-induced switching rate is the acquired-resistance analog of the pre-existing burden — biologically interpretable but practically unidentifiable from a short trial; ~100%+ CV expected.

parameters.label: initial resistant-clone burden (zero — resistance is acquired, not pre-existing)

extraction.source_locator: model assumption: no pre-existing resistance (R0 = 0); the resistant pool is generated by switching
extraction.tier_rationale: Fixed at zero by the acquired-resistance assumption (the contrast against the pre-existing two-population R0).

known_failure_modes.condition: applied to a regimen whose resistance is pre-existing rather than treatment-acquired
known_failure_modes.behavior: alpha unidentifiable; the acquired regrowth tail is fabricated rather than fit
